name: io.github.michaelrobertsutton/verified-googledocs-mcp
description: MCP server for Google Docs with verified writes — every mutation returns before/after proof.

environmentVariables.name: VERIFIED_GOOGLEDOCS_MCP_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Path to the OAuth client-secret JSON. Defaults to ~/.config/verified-googledocs-mcp/credentials.json.

environmentVariables.name: VERIFIED_GOOGLEDOCS_MCP_AUDIT_EXCERPTS
environmentVariables.description: Set to a falsey value (0/false/no/off) to redact before/after content excerpts from the local audit log.
